layout.background: light off-white slide on dark stage

blocks.text: Better Tools and Organisation are about breaking ceilings

MadQA is a PDF-based enterprise task QA benchmark.
The current state of the leaderboard demonstrates the importance of both tools and organisation.
For tools, BM25 hits the same ceiling for human and agent. Better tools are needed!
For organisation, moving from an “everything-agent” to a decoupled assistants paradigm narrows the gap between agents and humans by over a third!

Human + Oracle (Perfect) Documents 99.4
Gemini 3.5 Flash + Mixedbread Searcher Agent 93.4
Gemini 3.5 Flash + Mixedbread Search Tool 88.9
Gemini 3 Pro + BM25 82.2
Human + BM25 82.2
